pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Builder
pyqgis_plugin.description: Full RORB rainfall-runoff routing model from shapefiles with batch design storm analysis and results viewer
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.8: RORB Results Viewer — reads a folder of RORBWin .out files (one per AEP/Duration/TP), auto-parses filenames, plots all temporal patterns with per-TP toggles and mean-peak reference line, highlights representative TP per ARR 2016 Book 4 Ch3 s2.3, exports critical duration hydrographs to CSV. v2.7: Export all hydrographs to folder (one CSV per AEP/Duration/TP). v2.6: Exact ARR 2016 ARF formula (ARF2019.R). v2.5: Auto-compute ARF per event from LONGARF parameters. v2.4: TP numbers match RORB global convention. v2.1: Batch design storms with ARR 2016 critical duration and representative TP.
